$comment: Phase E Reliability Gate verdict, RUN 2 (re-verification after two rounds of code-review remediation). RS = (NLI x FactScore x DRE x Coverage)^(1/4). Every component independently re-verified against the CURRENT code on 2026-06-06, NOT copied from prior JSON. Coverage re-run via 'python -m pytest --cov=backend --cov=ingestion --cov=router --cov=db --cov-report=term-missing' produced TOTAL 100% (1824 stmts / 0 missed; 258 branches / 0 partial) with 0 modules below 100% and NO numpy/qdrant ImportError. Full suite: 316 passed / 1 skipped / 0 failed (junitxml-parsed). Frontend vitest: 58 passed across 14 files. The original run-1 1.0 was over-optimistic: it was validated against schema-valid FAKE ids; a /code-review then caught 10 real defects (incl. a CRITICAL API-500-on-every-real-document id/schema mismatch) now fixed and regression-tested with real-shaped ids. Security from docs/phase-F-security/security_verdict.json (unresolved_total=0, APPROVED; findings.json open=0). Audit-only; no artifact modified except the two files under docs/phase-E-reliability/.

dre_convention.alternative_gate_rigor_view: If review-caught defects are counted as escaped-from-the-CI-gates (Phase C/D leaked them), gate-effectiveness of Phase C/D was below 1.0 even though process containment is 1.0. RS uses process-DRE because the deploy decision is about what reaches production, which is zero.
dre_convention.note_on_run1: Run-1 Phase D dre=1.0 (found=0, escaped=0) was a no-evidence 1.0 (no defects had been discovered yet), not a high-rigor one.

faithfulness_reassessment.verdict_on_current_code: NLI=1.0 and FactScore=1.0 defensible on current code
faithfulness_reassessment.reason: The signed Phase C scorecard was computed at pytest=141 passed (pre-fix) and asserted contract-faithfulness (section ids mirror pipeline derivation, upload returns openapi contract end-to-end) that did NOT hold for real documents at signing time - schema-valid fake ids masked the id/schema 500. Current 1.0 rests on this auditor's targeted spot-check of the fixed seams over the 316-passed tree; a full Phase C re-run should refresh the signed scorecard before NLI/FactScore=1.0 is treated as system of record. Gate still PASSES on current evidence.

spot_checks_entailed.evidence: ingestion/ids.py (doc_<32hex>/sec_<32hex>, hyphen-free); backend/app/api/schemas.py:20-21; router/schema.py:28; regression ingestion/tests/test_pipeline.py:172-209 over the REAL pipeline
router/graph.py:204 eligible>=LOW_CONFIDENCE_FLOOR(0.5) applied before caller threshold (205-209)

delta_vs_prior_phase_d_json.note: Remediation rounds added production code and regression tests; coverage held at 100% on the larger surface. This re-run, not the stale JSON, is what the gate relies on.

verification.nli_source: re-assessed on current code (prior scorecard at pytest=141 superseded); docs/phase-C-hallucination/faithfulness_scorecard.json
verification.dre_source: code-review remediation history (git log) + process-DRE convention

escape_history.critical_defect: API 500 on every real document: bare hyphenated uuid5 doc_id/section_id failed backend ^doc_/^sec_ schemas and the router ^sec_ filter; masked by schema-valid fake ids in the original suites.
escape_history.other_defects: router sub-0.5 selection regression (#8); TOC range/disjointness + embedder-dimension guards (#6,#7); upload 415/413 + separate rate-limit buckets; None-safe stable-tie fair multi-doc merge + content-type normalization (#8,#9,#10); frontend silent-abort/reset-on-doc-switch/dedup-open/unmount guard (#2-#5,#7,#10).
